channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cebu Court Rules Out Terrorism Charges Against Local NGO
item.description: CEBU, Philippines – A regional court in Cebu City has dismissed the terrorism financing case filed against 27 current and former members of the Community Empowerment Resource Network (CERNET), a local...

item.title: Supreme Court upholds order for removal and sterilisation of stray dogs in public areas
item.description: On May 19, 2026, the Supreme Court of India declined to modify its earlier order from November 7, 2025, which directed all States and Union Territories to remove stray dogs from high-footfall public i...

item.title: DCMS and Channel 4 respond to serious sexual assault allegations on Married at First Sight UK
item.description: The Department for Culture, Media and Sport (DCMS) has described allegations of rape and non-consensual sexual acts on Channel 4's Married at First Sight (MAFS) UK as 'serious', calling for consequenc...

item.title: Expert Warns Trump Event Challenges Separation of Church and State
item.description: During the 'Rededicate 250' event on May 17, 2026, President Donald Trump held a large-scale prayer gathering on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., which has drawn criticism from experts on politi...

item.title: Woman dies and two children hurt after landslide hits house in Rodriguez, Rizal
item.description: A tragic landslide struck Barangay Mascap in Rodriguez, Rizal on Sunday, resulting in the death of a 37-year-old housewife and injuries to two of her children. According to police reports from Camp Vi...

item.title: MEA defends India’s democratic credentials during PM Modi’s Norway visit
item.description: During Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to Norway, the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) firmly defended India's democratic institutions and human rights record after a Norwegian journalist raise...

item.title: RCMP Investigates Theft of 5,000 Litres of Fuel and Environmental Spill in Edmonton
item.description: Earlier this month, roughly 5,000 litres of diesel and premium fuel were stolen from Tempo Gas on Wye Road in Uncas, Alberta. Strathcona County RCMP reported that the theft occurred between midnight a...

item.title: NBI issues cyber search warrant for Franco Mabanta’s devices over investigation
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has issued a cyber search warrant targeting the electronic devices of Franco Mabanta. This action is part of an ongoing investigation related to alleged exto...

item.title: Hantavirus Risks in Africa: Climate Change, Rodents, and Gaps in Disease Monitoring
item.description: Hantaviruses don dey around for rodent populations like rats and mice for many years. Human beings fit catch the virus if dem bite or scratch you, or if person inhale tiny particles from rodent urine,...

item.title: Wembanyama leads Spurs to double-overtime win over Thunder
item.description: Victor Wembanyama put on a spectacular performance as the San Antonio Spurs overcame the Oklahoma City Thunder in an intense double-overtime game during the NBA playoffs. Fans witnessed an incredible ...

item.title: Linda Cristal: Iconic Studio Portraits and Career Highlights from the 1950s
item.description: Linda Cristal, born Marta Victoria Moya Peggo Burges on February 24, 1931, was an Argentine–American actress who rose to fame in the 1950s. Initially a star in the Mexican film industry, she successfu...

item.title: Edmonton councillor proposes 'Forever Canadian Avenue' to celebrate federalist support
item.description: Edmonton city councillor Michael Janz has announced plans to rename a portion of 99th Avenue, the street adjacent to Alberta's legislature, to 'Forever Canadian Avenue'. The move aims to symbolically ...

item.title: PCA Upholds Pakistan’s Rights Under Indus Waters Treaty Against Indian Hydropower Projects
item.description: The Permanent Court of Arbitration (PCA) has issued a supplemental award in response to Pakistan’s decade-old challenge regarding the design specifications of two Indian hydropower projects on rivers ...

item.title: Lagos Community Struggles with Waterborne Diseases Affecting Children
item.description: For Ago Egun, one waterfront area for Bariga, Lagos, clean water na serious problem. Residents, mostly fishermen and their families, dey rely on underground wells wey dey contaminated by toxic lagoon ...

item.title: Three Killed in San Diego Mosque Shooting Investigated as Potential Hate Crime
item.description: Police are investigating a shooting outside the Islamic Center of San Diego that resulted in the deaths of three adults, including a security guard credited with preventing a greater tragedy. Two teen...

item.title: Five People Killed in San Diego Mosque Shooting, Including Two Suspects
item.description: On May 18, 2026, a tragic shooting occurred at the Islamic Center of San Diego, resulting in the deaths of five individuals, including two suspected shooters. The suspects, aged 17 and 18, reportedly ...

item.title: Matatu Strike Disrupts Travel Across Kenya as Operators Demand Fuel Price Cuts
item.description: Commuters in Kenya are facing massive disruptions for a second day running as matatu operators keep their vehicles off the roads in protest over high fuel prices. Hundreds of passengers were stranded ...

item.title: UK unemployment rises slightly as job vacancies fall amid global uncertainties
item.description: The UK unemployment rate has increased to 5% in the three months to March, up from 4.9% in the previous quarter, while job vacancies fell to 705,000, the lowest level in five years. Analysts attribute...

item.title: Femi Gbajabiamila’s Role as Chief of Staff in Tinubu’s Presidency
item.description: For every government, some offices dey carry big wahala inside dem, and some dey just dey for show. The Chief of Staff na one of those offices wey dey very important. Femi Gbajabiamila wey be ex-Speak...

item.title: Pretoria Film Student Shortlisted for International Filmmaking Award
item.description: Talita Brits, a 24-year-old film student from Pretoria, has been selected as one of five finalists in the student category of the 2026 Sony Future Filmmaker Awards, beating thousands of entries from 1...
